business_question: Which products have the highest return rates?
business_context: Quality and merchandising teams want to identify products causing customer dissatisfaction and excessive returns.

aggregation_logic.Return Rate: return quantity divided by quantity sold

sql_answer:
SELECT
    PRODUCT_ID,
    SUM(RETURN_QTY) AS TOTAL_RETURNS,
    SUM(RETURN_AMOUNT) AS RETURN_AMOUNT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_RETURNS
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY RETURN_AMOUNT DESC;
